name: api-elite-four-fire-red-route-policy

starterTeamPolicy.starterChoice: Choose Bulbasaur when available because its Grass/Poison typing gives the most robust early-game path through Brock and Misty while keeping later team slots flexible.
starterTeamPolicy.selectionPolicy: During the initial starter flow, choose the enabled semantic option whose label, description, or action payload contains Bulbasaur. If Bulbasaur is unavailable, choose Squirtle; if neither is available, choose the first enabled starter option and record the deviation.
starterTeamPolicy.teamPolicy: Build a practical completion team through legitimate API actions only. Catch useful encounters, grind levels, shop for legal items, and use held/bag items through exposed semantic options. Do not edit party, stats, inventory, flags, map position, or save data directly.

allowedStrategies: choose semantic options returned by GET /sessions/:id/state snapshots
catch Pokemon through normal battle/API flows
grind wild or trainer battles through semantic options
shop at marts and use items through semantic options
use debug snapshot metadata only for route diagnostics and milestone detection
export and load portable API save blobs for checkpoint rollback
forbiddenStrategies: debug warps, teleports, or bypassed progression
Pokedex or postgame expansion beyond Hall of Fame completion

stuckDetection.rollbackPolicy: On a classified stuck state, load the most recent legitimate checkpoint save blob and resume from its checkpoint label; if no checkpoint exists, fail with evidence instead of mutating state.

milestones.name: Starter choice
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Leave Pallet Town, complete the parcel flow, and progress through Viridian Forest toward Pewter City.

milestones.name: Boulder Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Travel through Mt. Moon to Cerulean City and prepare for Misty.

milestones.name: Cascade Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Clear Nugget Bridge/Bill flow as needed, reach Vermilion City, and prepare for Lt. Surge.

milestones.name: Thunder Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Route through Rock Tunnel/Lavender/Celadon and prepare for Erika.

milestones.name: Rainbow Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Resolve Rocket/Lavender progression, then route toward Fuchsia and Saffron objectives.

milestones.name: Soul Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Complete required Safari/Fuchsia progression and route to Saffron Gym.

milestones.name: Marsh Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Route to Cinnabar Island and prepare for Blaine.

milestones.name: Volcano Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Return to Viridian Gym and prepare for Giovanni.

milestones.name: Earth Badge
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Defeat the Route 22 rival and enter Victory Road.

milestones.name: Route 22 rival
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Pass badge gates and enter Victory Road.

milestones.name: Victory Road entry
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Navigate Victory Road, using legal items and battles as needed, then exit toward Indigo Plateau.

milestones.name: Victory Road exit
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Shop, heal, save a checkpoint, and challenge Lorelei.

milestones.name: Elite Four Lorelei
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Proceed directly to Bruno after victory; recover with legal items if needed.

milestones.name: Elite Four Bruno
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Proceed directly to Agatha after victory; recover with legal items if needed.

milestones.name: Elite Four Agatha
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Proceed directly to Lance after victory; recover with legal items if needed.

milestones.name: Elite Four Lance
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Save before Champion, use legal recovery, and enter the Champion battle.

milestones.name: Champion
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Advance through post-battle Hall of Fame registration without starting postgame goals.

milestones.name: Hall of Fame
milestones.nextGoalPolicy: Stop the run after checkpointing final completion evidence.
